programmes.show_description: The squad is called in to investigate a wave of hate crimes on Christmas Eve. Amanda catches up with an old flame.
A cheating wife and her lover are in the frame for poisoning her husband, a bestselling historian.
Goren and Eames travel to Vietnam to arrest a man claiming to have killed ten-year-old actress Amberleigh Harner in 1992.
The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Jessica Fletcher must uncover the link between numerous break-ins in New York and the murder of a sleazy aspiring entrepreneur whose body is found in a salon.
Jessica suspects foul play when her friend's estranged husband is killed in what appears to be an accident.
Erin's trial against a human trafficker is jeopardised when the presiding judge is found dead. Mayor Dutton opposes Frank's public safety initiative.
A detective in a mob case is killed. Garrett is accosted outside his home by a SWAT team after a false report.
Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a single mother whose ex-husband has a history of violence. Jamie's efforts to save a woman who overdosed on drugs has unexpected consequences.
When a famous basketball player is found dead in his apartment of an apparent drug overdose, Danny looks into ties to old friends in a local gang.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A case turns personal for Danny when he works to protect a nurse from her violent ex-boyfriend. An acquaintance of Frank's comes to him with a theory regarding the death of an inmate.
When Deeks is shot while trying to stop a robbery, Callen and Sam discover that he is being used as bait in a bigger plan.
Sam resumes a former alias, Hakeem Fayed, and boards a one-way flight to Yemen to track down the leader of a terrorist group.
The unit faces a race against time after a Navy Intelligence Commander responsible for tracking a visiting diplomat disappears.
When a secure facility on a military base is compromised, Kensi goes undercover to find out what the world-class thief was intending to steal.
Eric goes undercover for the first time after a rocket engine expert is murdered.
Deeks is forced to resume an old alias to protect his best friend and chief informant from a group of arms traffickers.
When Benson and Stabler assist in the case of a young girl's shooting, they realise it's more than a typical homicide.
A group of teens terrorising tourists has the SVU squad working overtime; McGrath teams them up with the Bronx gang unit to track down a crucial lead.
A boy disappears after meeting up with an online gamer. Benson suspects her son is being bullied.
When a popular fighter doesn't show up for the biggest bout of the year, Rollins and Velasco are drawn into a complicated web of secrets. McGrath confides in Benson.
Logan and Wheeler investigate the murder of a record producer. Suspicion falls on a bouncer at a nearby club until an aspiring singer enters the frame.
Goren and Eames probe the disappearance of a police chief's daughter. The army officer, on leave from Iraq, vanishes after a night out.
A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Patriot Down: Crime drama series. When a colleague's murder sends shockwaves through the team, Gibbs uncovers a surprising link to the crime.
Rule Fifty-One: Crime drama series following the US navy's dedicated federal agency. Gibbs heads to Mexico to face his demons and makes a startling decision.
The Spider and The Fly: US crime drama series. The NCIS team become targets of female mobster Paloma Reynosa, who is trying to fulfil her vendetta against Gibbs.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
When a woman turns up dead and her boyfriend goes missing, Briscoe and Green turn their attention to the last person to see the pair alive.
The prime suspect in a murder investigation claims his knowledge of the death came from a psychic vision.
When the admissions officer at a top school is found dead, Briscoe and Green launch an investigation.
Compassion: Police drama series. The murder of a con man leads detectives to one of his victims, a dedicated doctor who treats terminally ill children.
Ill-Conceived: Police drama series. When a factory owner is found murdered, the detectives search for an unidentified evening caller whose girlfriend recently gave birth.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Darwinian: Police drama series. After a hit-and-run victim is left to die, McCoy and Southerlyn are determined to get the driver on a murder charge.
A Man Walks into a Bar: US crime drama series. The team has to undergo mandatory psychological evaluations while investigating the death of a naval commander.
Defiance: US crime drama. A defence minister's daughter is kidnapped while under NCIS protection and the team needs to find her before her father signs a controversial treaty.
Kill Screen: US crime drama series. The NCIS team hunts a ruthless murderer after the dismembered fingertips and teeth of a murdered marine are found in a pickpocket's stolen purse.
After NCIS learns that the owner of Parker's favourite bakery is being blackmailed, they hatch a plan to save her from the perpetrators.
Benson tries to help a pop star in a volatile relationship; Rollins struggles with taking the stress of work home with her; Fin teaches a rookie a lesson in respecting fellow officers.
A home invasion and kidnapping leads the SVU to a shocking discovery. Muncy tries to fit in with the squad.
A young woman who learns about her birth parents asks Benson for help. Carisi and Rollins assess the risks of publicly disclosing their relationship.
